title: AmethystTools
description: This plugin was inspired by the Amethyst Tools found on the DonutSMP server.
body:
![AmethystTools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/170092caa460eae2df6758bbff844b08c41978ef.png)
AmethystTools is a powerful and customizable Paper plugin that adds special amethyst-based tools with advanced mining abilities and interactive GUI features. Inspired by custom tool systems like those used in popular SMP servers, this plugin enhances survival gameplay with smarter and faster block breaking mechanics. ## 📦 Version Information Starting with version `1.4`, the plugin is distributed as a single JAR file. - Copper tools are **not available** in Minecraft `1.21 - 1.21.8` - Copper tools are available in `1.21.9+` and `26.1.X` **✨ Features** - ⛏️ 3x3 Area Mining - Break multiple blocks at once depending on player direction. - Supports horizontal and vertical mining. - Types of pickaxes, shovels, and axes are available for wood, stone, iron, copper, gold, diamond, and netherite. **🔄 Mining System** - Detects where the player is looking. - Breaks blocks upward or downward accordingly. **🧩 Fork Optimized** - Optimized for Paper and Folia Forks.
